data.title: Chevron Announces About 20% Workforce Reduction In Cost-Saving Initiative: 'Responsible Leadership Requires Taking These Steps'
data.description: In a significant cost-saving move, oil behemoth Chevron Corp. (NYSE: CVX) has announced plans to slash its workforce by up to 20%.

data.title: After DeepSeek Shook Wall Street, China's Baidu Gears Up For AI Battle With Next-Gen Ernie 5.0 Launch In Late 2025
data.description: In the face of rising competition in the artificial intelligence (AI) market, Chinese tech giant, Baidu, is preparing to roll out its next-generation AI model later this year.

data.title: Taiwan Semiconductor Could Be The Lifeline Intel Needs As Rumors Swirl Of A US-Backed Joint Venture
data.description: Rumors suggest the U.S. government may push Intel into a joint venture with TSMC to revive its struggling foundry business, potentially securing CHIPS Act funding and strengthening domestic semiconductor manufacturing.

data.title: Why AppLovin Shares Are Trading Higher By Around 29%; Here Are 20 Stocks Moving Premarket
Mitch McConnell Criticizes Trump's Tariff Plans, Warns Of Potential Price Hike: 'Big, Lingering Concerns For American Industry And Workers'
data.description: Republican Senator Mitch McConnell expressed his concerns over President Donald Trump's tariff policies, warning that they could trigger a trade war and subsequently inflate prices for consumers and businesses in the U.S.
